────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────

⋆⭒˚.⋆ Little Sneak Peak ⋆.˚⭒⋆

Ivan stood before the coffin, his hand trembling as he slowly shut the large door. He stepped back, stepped away, the non-existent eyes of the people around him silently watching, as if his ever movement was being judged.

He walked past the faceless figures that his mind didn't even bother to conjure properly, mere silhouettes that stood idly around the nearly empty church. His shoulders slumped as he sat upon one of the many pews, head held in his hands, trying his hardest not to cry. Men don't cry.

Ivan was snapped out of his sad, pathetic train of thought as he felt something - or someone - sit down beside him. Reluctantly pulling his gaze away from his palms, his eyes widened at the sight of just who it was.

"User?"

He uttered, quickly straightening up at the sight of his friend, or well, his ex-friend. What was User doing here? He had to talk to him, to apologize! Damnit, speak, Ivan, you fool! Before he was able to actually do so, he felt User's hand come down to rest on his thigh.

"User..?"

────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────
